title: T:R Modpack
description:
Tensura: Reincarnated alongside Biomes O' Plenty, quality of life, and light optimization.
Forge 1.19.2
body:
# **T:R Modpack**

A modpack featuring [Tensura: Reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated) alongside Biomes O' Plenty and some light optimization. My primary focus in making this was a balance of gameplay and optimization. **I've made sure that this modpack can run on lower-end computers!**

This might not include everything you'd personally want for your experience, so please feel free to add your own selection of mods. 

[TenSura Mod Discord server](https://discord.gg/tensuramod) (Not mine)

**If you want to contact me, ping @Cometfable in the off-topic channel**
